headline: Strong Segment Revenues & Buyouts Aid Veralto Amid Stiff Rivalry
summary: VLTO gains from strong Water Quality and PQI demand, digital acquisitions and operating leverage, while volatility and competition remain key risks.

raw.headline: Strong Segment Revenues & Buyouts Aid Veralto Amid Stiff Rivalry

headline: 3 Mid-Cap Stocks Walking a Fine Line
summary: Many investors pay attention to mid-cap stocks because they have established business models and expansive market opportunities. However, their paths to becoming $100 billion corporations are ripe with competition, ranging from giants with vast resources to agile upstarts eager to disrupt the status quo.
